metadata.note: This is a same-public-dataset benchmark for Porto taxi trajectories. It is closer to NASR-style route recovery than the OSM public trace pseudo-history experiment, but it does not claim NASR reproduction unless the official NASR code is run under matched data/splits.
metadata.nasr_reproduction_status: Not reproduced in this script. The official NASR repository is public, but its preprocessing and training format are different from this OSMnx route-candidate evaluator.

summary.skip_reason: Porto trajectories do not include natural-language preference text.
Hybrid requires both profile history and natural-language preference text.

skip_reason_counts.reason: learned_feature_ranker skipped: Need at least 30 prior candidate-label examples.
